title: `athaq #6275
definition:
1) to move, proceed, advance, move on, become old, be removed
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to move
        1a2) to advance (in years), grow old and weak
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to move forward, proceed, move on
        1b2) to remove
        1b3) to transcribe
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to move, proceed, advance, move on, become old, be removed
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to move
        1a2) to advance (in years), grow old and weak
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to move forward, proceed, move on
        1b2) to remove
        1b3) to transcribe

    NASB:  to move, proceed, advance
